name: SSL Certificate Checker
description: Comprehensive SSL/TLS certificate inspection skill — check expiry, chain validity, STARTTLS protocols, and edge cases. Zero dependencies, cross-platform, GPG-signed via SkillSeal.
review: Exemplary SSL certificate skill — complete workflow with STARTTLS, edge case handling, platform-aware commands, and full MANIFEST/TRUST infrastructure. First GPG-signed skill in the catalog via SkillSeal. Documentation is best-in-class.
